caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, over-ear headphones, and a black hoodie with "BOSS" written in gold lettering sits in a studio setting. He is positioned behind a desk with a professional condenser microphone on a boom arm in front of him. He wears a gold watch and a gold chain. In the background, a white banner displays the words "HUSTLE" and gold stars, while a blue sign above him reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". To his right on the desk is a black container with red and white text that says "TALK OUT". A small logo featuring a microphone is visible in the lower-left corner of the scene. Across the sequence, the man remains seated and maintains a similar posture, slightly gesturing with his hands near the microphone as he looks toward someone off-screen to his left, appearing to be in the middle of a conversation.
